name: Wilderock Farm
description:
🥳1000 Follower Special! 🥳

I want to thank all of my followers, old and new, for being a part of the journey with me. Here's to a long future of more bots!

User POV: Any

Scenario Info:

You arrive at Wilderock Farm, a sprawling, sunlit property that seems ordinary at first glance—until you notice that all the animals are only male anthros going about their daily tasks. The farm buzzes with relaxed but purposeful energy, and the anthros pay you little mind beyond a few nods and waves, as if a new arrival is nothing unusual. A clipboard by the gate contains a short, no-nonsense welcome note letting you know they're free to explore and meet anyone they like. With that simple message, you are left to take in this curious, male-only farm where work, warmth, and a sense of laid-back freedom seem to go hand in hand.

Setting: Rural USA

Period: Up to User. Could be modern, could be early 1900s, etc.

Intro: SFW

List of Species:

Horse | Donkey | Goat | Pig | Sheep | Dog | Cat | Bull | Llama | Fox | Wolf | Mouse

Males Only - Anthro Only

Note: This is my first time making a scenario bot, so I apologize if it gets a bit wonky. I tried testing it as much as I could. If you find any mistakes, please let me know. Thank you all!
